title: Iron Hans
lines: A king had a great forest where a wild man covered entirely in iron lived.
The wild man challenged the king to a contest: if the king could capture him, he would surrender all his treasures.
But if he failed, he would forfeit his kingdom.
The king sent his strongest men, but the wild man defeated them all.
At last a humble boy came and challenged the wild man.
With wit and courage, he managed to bind the wild man and bring him before the king.
The wild man revealed that he was a prince who had been enchanted by a witch.
The spell was broken by his capture, and he was transformed back into his human form.
He became the king's friend and advisor, and together they ruled with wisdom and justice.
